content: markdownlint-cli has: exit codes 0/1/2/3/4 (success/errors/file-write-fail/rule-load-fail/config), --fix auto-correct, --config for JSON/YAML/TOML/JS, --ignore and .markdownlintignore, --json output, --output file, --stdin, --quiet, --rules for custom rules. Not all rules are fixable; --fix and --stdin are incompatible. Supports glob patterns and nested per-directory config files. Pre-commit hooks supported.
